description_long: This is a Salomon S-LAB running shoe, primarily gray with white and black accents and a streamlined, athletic design. The upper is constructed from a breathable mesh material with synthetic overlays for structural support, and features a quick-lace system with a blue lace and branded pull tab. The midsole is cushioned and slightly contoured, providing ergonomic support for running or walking, while the outsole is made of durable rubber with a rugged tread for traction. Branding is visible on the lateral side and heel, with 'Salomon' and 'S-LAB' text in white. A product tag is attached to the side, indicating it is new and unused. The interior appears padded for comfort, and the overall build suggests a lightweight yet sturdy construction suitable for urban or trail environments.
description: A gray Salomon S-LAB running shoe with a quick-lace system, mesh upper, and rugged sole, designed for comfort and performance. Features visible branding and a product tag, indicating new condition.
description_view_0: Side view showing the Salomon branding, mesh upper, and quick-lace system.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the padded heel collar and Salomon logo on the heel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with S-LAB branding and attached product tag.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the toe box, quick-lace system, and mesh texture.
attribute_logo: White 'Salomon' text on the lateral side and heel; S-LAB logo on the side in white.
